filename: GPs Interviews - The Good Practice -  Nov 4th_.docx
summary: This document is an interview guide used to conduct research sessions with General Practitioners regarding their triage workflows. It outlines specific objectives and questions about decision-making, communication logs, and process improvements within the NHS context. The content focuses on gathering requirements to optimize patient care processes.
